name: f_horse_age
f_spec: Directly extracted from starters.馬齡 (e.g., 3, 6, 8).

name: f_draw
f_spec: Directly extracted from starters.檔位 (barrier number, 1-14).

name: f_declared_weight
f_spec: Directly extracted from starters.負磅 (declared carrying weight in lbs).

name: f_horse_weight
f_spec: Directly extracted from starters.排位體重 (horse body weight in lbs at declaration).

name: f_weight_change
f_spec: Directly extracted from starters.排位體重+/- (weight change in lbs since last run).

name: f_weight_change_pct
f_spec: Computed as 排位體重+/- ÷ 排位體重 (weight change as a fraction of declared weight).

name: f_current_rating
f_spec: Directly extracted from starters.評分 (current HKJC official rating).

name: f_rating_change
f_spec: Directly extracted from starters.評分+/- (rating adjustment since last run).

name: f_days_since_last_run
f_spec: Directly extracted from starters.上賽距今日數 (days since the horse's most recent race).

name: f_gallop_count_7d
f_spec: Count of 'gallop' (快操) workout entries in trackwork data within the 7 days before race_date.

name: f_gallop_count_14d
f_spec: Count of 'gallop' (快操) workout entries in trackwork data within the 14 days before race_date.

name: f_gallop_count_28d
f_spec: Count of 'gallop' (快操) workout entries in trackwork data within the 28 days before race_date.

name: f_gallop_last_time_sec
f_spec: Parsed from the most recent gallop's time string — extracts the final sectional time (seconds) from the last gallop entry in trackwork.

name: f_swim_count_14d
f_spec: Count of 'swim' (游泳) entries in trackwork data within the 14 days before race_date.

name: f_trot_count_14d
f_spec: Count of 'trot' (踱步) entries in trackwork data within the 14 days before race_date.

name: f_intensity_score_14d
f_spec: Weighted composite: 3.0×gallop_14d + 2.5×trial_14d + 1.0×swim_14d + 0.5×trot_14d. Measures overall training exertion.

name: f_has_partner_gallop
f_spec: Binary (0/1). Set to 1 if any gallop record's text contains the keyword '伴跳馬' (companion horse).

name: f_gallop_jockey_match_flag
f_spec: Binary (0/1). Set to 1 if the race jockey's name appears in any gallop workout record.

name: f_vet_days_since_injury
f_spec: Minimum value of vet[].特徵_傷患距今日數 (days since each vet-recorded injury). Defaults to 9999 if no vet records exist.

name: f_vet_recovery_days
f_spec: Minimum value of vet[].特徵_康復期耗時天數 (recovery duration of the most recent injury). Defaults to 0 if no data.

name: f_vet_tendon_issue
f_spec: Binary (0/1). Set to 1 if any vet record's 傷患詳情 matches regex: 肌腱|腿患|韌帶|骨折 (tendon/ligament/fracture).

name: f_vet_total_incidents_count
f_spec: Total count of vet records for this horse (regardless of date).

name: f_vet_recent_90d_flag
f_spec: Binary (0/1). Set to 1 if any vet record has 特徵_傷患距今日數 ≤ 90 days.

name: f_incident_last_days
f_spec: Minimum days since any racing incident (computed from incidents[].上次事件日期 vs race_date). Defaults to 9999 if no incidents.

name: f_incident_slow_out_flag
f_spec: Binary (0/1). Set to 1 if any incident's 競賽事件摘要 matches: 慢閘|失去平衡|向內斜跑|向外斜跑 (slow start / imbalance).

name: f_incident_gear_lost_flag
f_spec: Binary (0/1). Set to 1 if any incident's 競賽事件摘要 matches: 失去蹄鐵|配備脫落 (lost shoe / gear脱落).

name: f_incident_blocked_flag
f_spec: Binary (0/1). Set to 1 if any incident's 競賽事件摘要 matches: 受阻|受擠壓|無通路 (blocked / crowded / no clear run).

name: f_incident_count_last_5
f_spec: Count of incident records where days_since_last ≤ 9999 (effectively counts all dated incidents, proxy for recent event frequency).

name: f_exp_distance_delta
f_spec: Extracted from exceptional[].途程 (distance change in meters vs last run, e.g., +450).

name: f_exp_gear_first_time
f_spec: Binary (0/1). Set to 1 if exceptional[].配備 contains '1' or '+' (indicating first-time gear, e.g., CP1).

name: f_exp_gear_removed
f_spec: Binary (0/1). Set to 1 if exceptional[].配備 contains '-' (indicating gear removed, e.g., B-).

name: f_exp_rating_drop
f_spec: Extracted from exceptional[].評分 (cumulative rating drop, e.g., -18 indicates a heavily dropped horse).

name: f_career_total_runs
f_spec: Count of career_records entries with a race_date strictly before the current race_date (leakage-safe).

name: f_career_win_rate
f_spec: Historical win rate = Wins ÷ Total runs (computed from leakage-filtered career_records).

name: f_career_top3_rate
f_spec: Historical top-3 rate = (Wins + 2nd + 3rd) ÷ Total runs (computed from leakage-filtered career_records).

name: f_career_avg_rank_last3
f_spec: Average finishing position (名次) of the 3 most recent career_records before race_date. Imputed to 14.0 if insufficient history.

name: f_career_avg_rank_last5
f_spec: Average finishing position (名次) of the 5 most recent career_records before race_date. Imputed to 14.0 if insufficient history.

name: f_career_avg_margin_last3
f_spec: Average beaten margin (in lengths) behind the winner from the 3 most recent career_records. Parsed via parse_margin_to_lengths().

name: f_course_cd_win_rate
f_spec: Win rate filtered to career_records matching the same course (馬場) AND same distance (途程) as the current race.

name: f_best_time_sec
f_spec: Minimum finishing time (parsed via parse_time_to_sec) among career_records with the same distance (途程) as the current race. Default 999.0 if no matching record.

name: f_pace_style_code
f_spec: Pace style coded from most recent race's 沿途走位: 1=Front-runner (avg pos ≤3), 2=Pace-tracker (avg pos 4-7), 3=Closer (avg pos >7). Position averaged from first two bends.

name: f_import_ISG
f_spec: One-hot encoding: 1 if f_is_imported_type == 'ISG' (International Sale Griffin).

name: f_import_PP
f_spec: One-hot encoding: 1 if f_is_imported_type == 'PP' (Private Purchase).

name: f_import_PPG
f_spec: One-hot encoding: 1 if f_is_imported_type == 'PPG' (Private Purchase Griffin).

name: f_declared_weight_z
f_spec: In-race Z-score of f_declared_weight: (value - race_mean) / race_stdev. Standardizes declared weight relative to the same race's field.

name: f_horse_weight_z
f_spec: In-race Z-score of f_horse_weight: (value - race_mean) / race_stdev. Standardizes horse weight relative to the same race's field.

name: f_current_rating_z
f_spec: In-race Z-score of f_current_rating: (value - race_mean) / race_stdev. Standardizes rating relative to the same race's field.

name: f_intensity_score_14d_z
f_spec: In-race Z-score of f_intensity_score_14d: (value - race_mean) / race_stdev. Standardizes training intensity relative to the same race's field.

name: f_career_avg_rank_last3_z
f_spec: In-race Z-score of f_career_avg_rank_last3: (value - race_mean) / race_stdev. Standardizes recent form rank relative to the same race's field.

name: f_draw_pct
f_spec: In-race percentile rank of f_draw: (rank(barrier) - 1) / (N - 1). Lower draw → lower percentile (more favorable).

name: f_rating_change_pct
f_spec: In-race percentile rank of f_rating_change: (rank(rating_change) - 1) / (N - 1). More negative change → lower percentile.

name: f_best_time_sec_pct
f_spec: In-race percentile rank of f_best_time_sec: (rank(best_time) - 1) / (N - 1). Faster time → lower percentile (more favorable).

name: win_prob
note: Calibrated win probability (sums to 1 per race)

name: pred_rank
note: Predicted rank within race (1 = top predicted)

name: market_odds
note: Live HKJC win odds (required for betting simulation)
